title: The Easements (Extending Act 5 of 1882), 1891
full_text: The Easements (Extending Act 5 of 1882), 1891 सुखाचार (1882 के अधिनियम सं० 5 का विस्‍तार) Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 189108 Act Number: 08 Enactment Date: 1891-03-06 Act Year: 1891 Short Title: The Easements (Extending Act 5 of 1882), 1891 Hindi Title: सुखाचार (1882 के अधिनियम सं० 5 का विस्‍तार) Long Title: An Act to extend the Indian Easements Act, 1882, to certain areas in which that Act is not in force. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 06-03-1891 Last Updated: 04-02-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Easements (Extending Act 5 of 1882), 1891 Show all section Section 1. Extension of Act V, 1882, to Bombay and the North-Western Provinces and Oudh.
